title: Multimodal RAG for Documents, Images, Tables, Layout, and Audio · Behavior Case: Rag Audio Video Retrieval
summary: A maintenance assistant extracts only PDF text, loses diagrams and table headers, cites whole pages, and presents visual evidence without text alternatives. Predict the stakeholder decision, corpus and query identity, relevance assumption, failure cost, and evidence that would falsify the proposed RAG claim before opening the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the audio video retrieval increment in accessible multimodal evidence retriever. Learners progress through prediction, e…
objectives: Align transcript, speaker, time, scene, slide, caption, confidence, and media segment while handling corrections and access policy.
Retrieve tables and charts with title, units, headers, cells, footnotes, series, axes, source coordinates, and calculation grain.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

"""rag-retrieval-augmented-generation cumulative evidence-grounded retrieval portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python models and fixed fixtures only.
Native ML packages, files, models, vector stores, provider APIs, networks, credentials,
OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production effects require authorized transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RagEvidence:
    corpus_version: str
    document_id: str
    chunk_id: str
    query_id: str
    source_span: str


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RetrievalBoundary:
    tenant_id: str
    authorized: bool
    answerable: bool
    context_budget: int


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python RAG engineering portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Worked focus: rag-audio-video-retrieval — Align transcript, speaker, time, scene, slide, caption, confidence, and media segment while handling corrections and access policy.
# Evidence: rag-worked-rag-multimodal-rag-5
# Competency: rag-worked-rag-multimodal-rag-5.
# Case 9036: a multilingual support escalation.
# Operating constraint: record the failed stage, causal trace, repair, rollback, recovery, and residual-risk owner.
# Changed case: remove one supporting source and require abstention instead of a plausible unsupported answer.
def worked_rag_multimodal_rag_5(pages: int = 8, text_regions: int = 20, image_regions: int = 6, table_regions: int = 4, coordinates_kept: bool = True, text_alternatives: bool = True, modality_evaluated: bool = True) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked5 = "worked5-5dekrow-9036"
    assert evidence_variant_worked5
    evidence_axes_worked5 = (
        "corpusworked5",
        "query5dekrow",
        "tenant9036",
        "indexworked59036",
        "prompt5dekrow9036",
        "evaluation9036worked5",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked5)) == 6
    if pages <= 0 or min(text_regions, image_regions, table_regions) < 0:
        return False, 0, "document-regions"
    if not coordinates_kept:
        return False, pages, "visual-citation"
    if not text_alternatives:
        return False, pages, "accessibility-alternative"
    if not modality_evaluated:
        return False, pages, "modality-quality"
    regions = text_regions + image_regions + table_regions
    assert regions >= pages
    return True, regions, "multimodal-evidence"

Build deterministic Python evidence to retrieve text, tables, images, layout, and audio evidence with coordinates and accessible alternatives; retain corpus, document, chunk, model, index, prompt, query, and evaluation version identity; then double corpus size and candidate depth while preserving the latency, memory, and cost envelope. Browser code uses pure bounded models and fixed fixtures only. Native Python packages, embedding or generation models, vector databases, files, networks, credentials, provider APIs, OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Align transcript, speaker, time, scene, slide, caption, confidence, and media segment while handling corrections and access policy.

Evidence target: RAG and Python Defend the Rag Audio Video Retrieval model · Theory Rag Audio Video Retrieval.
steps.why: Retrieving Rag Audio Video Retrieval through the concrete accessible multimodal evidence retriever case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide. For RAG and Python Defend the Rag Audio Video Retrieval model · Theory Rag Audio Video Retrieval, keep Rag Audio Video Retrieval connected to executable Python retrieval, grounding, evaluation, and evidence decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Align transcript, speaker, time, scene, slide, caption, confidence, and media segment while handling corrections and access policy.

hints: For RAG and Python Defend the Rag Audio Video Retrieval model · Theory Rag Audio Video Retrieval, name the stakeholder, corpus, source, document, chunk, model, index, query, relevance, tenant, context, citation, evaluation, and transfer boundary, Rag Audio Video Retrieval precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At RAG and Python Defend the Rag Audio Video Retrieval model · Theory Rag Audio Video Retrieval, trace this concrete input and predict ingestion, normalization, retrieval, filter, fusion, reranking, context, claim, citation, abstention, latency, cost, failure, and recovery evidence before reviewing it: A theory RAG engineering team handles case 7114 during a public-benefits policy change. Build deterministic Python evidence to retrieve text, tables, images, layout, and audio evidence with coordinates and accessible alternatives; retain corpus, document, chunk, model, index, prompt, query, and evaluation version identity; then double corpus size and candidate depth while preserving the latency, memory, and cost envelope. Browser code uses pure bounded models and fixed fixtures only. Native Python packages, embedding or generation models, vector databases, files, networks, credentials, provider APIs, OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Align transcript, speaker, time, scene, slide, caption, confidence, and media segment while handling corrections and access policy.

For RAG and Python Defend the Rag Audio Video Retrieval model · Theory Rag Audio Video Retrieval, challenge the documented misconception with changed-query, changed-corpus, relevance, retrieval, grounding, citation, adversarial, accessibility, failure, recovery, and controlled native or production-transfer evidence: A transcript timestamp alone proves who said what on screen.
